name: Ramsay Health Care Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$38.0745. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$38.0745, stop A$35.1252, target A$40.5900. Risk/reward is 0.85:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
